songs.title: Nice Guys Finish Last
feed: “Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day returns to #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for a 6th nonconsecutive week at the top.
“Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 66 sales units.
“Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 110 streams units.
“Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 251,804 total units.

songs.title: Don't Leave Me
feed: “Don't Leave Me” by blink-182 reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 12 spots to #3.
“Don't Leave Me” by blink-182 climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 12 spots to #3.
“Don't Leave Me” by blink-182 is the biggest percentage gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 75% to 215 points.

songs.title: Wake Me Up When September Ends
